zh.lifeSummary: Agnes於1501年6月24日出生在英國薩默塞特。她於1519年6月2日與Humphrey Blake在英國薩默塞特奧維 斯度維結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和2個女兒的父母。她去世於1585年6月24日在英國薩默塞特奧維 斯度維享年84歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭薩默塞特奧維 斯度維。

nameMeanings.name: Agnes
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Latinized version of the Greek name Hagnē, from the feminine form of the adjective hagnos ‘pure, holy’. This was the name of a young Roman virgin martyred in the persecutions instigated by the Roman emperor Diocletian in ad 303 . She became a very popular saint in the Middle Ages. Her name was early associated with Latin agnus ‘lamb’, leading to the consistent dropping of the initial H- and to her representation in art accompanied by a lamb. The colloquial form Annes led to some confusion with Ann(e) in earlier centuries. Frequent in the medieval period, the name was revived in the 19th century, and has been especially popular in Scotland. See also Annis .

historicEvents.title: Book of Common Prayer
historicEvents.description: Book of Common Prayer, a product of the English Reformation, was published in 1549 for assistance in the administration of the sacraments and other rites and ceremonies of the church according to the use of the Church of England. The book outlined morning, evening, and communion prayers and orders for baptism and marriage, thus making England a truly Protestant state.

historicEvents.title: Act of Uniformity
historicEvents.description: The Act of Uniformity was passed by the Parliament of England and required all people to go to church once a week. The consequence of not attending church was a fine of 12 pence, which was a considerable amount for a poor person.

historicEvents.title: State Lottery
historicEvents.description: A State Lottery was recorded in 1569. The tickets were sold at St. Paul's Cathedral in London.

historicEvents.title: The Royal Exchange is Organized
historicEvents.description: The Royal Exchange was organized in January 1571 by Sir Thomas Gresham. Gresham is known as the father of English banking.

en.lifeSummary: Agnes was born on 24 June 1501, in Somerset, England. She married Humphrey Blake on 2 June 1519, in Over Stowey, Somerset, England. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 2 daughters. She died on 24 June 1585, in Over Stowey, Somerset, England, at the age of 84, and was buried in Over Stowey, Somerset, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Agnes est née le 24 juin 1501, à Somerset, Angleterre. Elle a épousé Humphrey Blake le 2 juin 1519, à Over Stowey, Somerset, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 2 filles. Elle est décédée le 24 juin 1585, à Over Stowey, Somerset, Angleterre, à l’âge de 84 ans, et a été enterrée à Over Stowey, Somerset, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Sie starb am 24. Juni 1585 im Alter von 84 Jahren in Over Stowey, Somerset, England und wurde in Over Stowey, Somerset, England, United Kingdom begraben.

ja.lifeSummary: Agnesは1501年6月24日にイギリスソメルセトで生まれた。1519年6月2日にイギリスソメルセトオバー ストウエイでHumphrey Blakeと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼女は1585年6月24日にイギリスソメルセトオバー ストウエイで84歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスソメルセトオバー ストウエイにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Agnes(은)는 1501년 6월 24일 영국 서머세트에서 태어났다. 그녀는 1519년 6월 2일 영국 서머세트 버 스타우이에서 Humphrey Blake(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1585년 6월 24일 영국 서머세트 버 스타우이에서 84세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 서머세트 버 스타우이에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Agnes nasceu em 24 de junho de 1501, em Somerset, Inglaterra. Ela casou-se com Humphrey Blake em 2 de junho de 1519, em Over Stowey, Somerset, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 2 filhas. Ela faleceu em 24 de junho de 1585, em Over Stowey, Somerset, Inglaterra, com 84 anos, e foi sepultada em Over Stowey, Somerset, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Agnes родилась 24 июня 1501 г. в местности сомирсет, Англия. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Humphrey Blake 2 июня 1519 г. в местности овир стоуи, сомирсет, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 2 дочери. Она умерла 24 июня 1585 г. в местности овир стоуи, сомирсет, Англия в возрасте 84 лет и была похоронена в местности овир стоуи, сомирсет, Англия, Великобритания.
